task_text: We need to finalize the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. There's a draft in the sandbox — find it, review it, and improve it so it reads as more personalized and professional. Save the improved version back to the same file.

To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Dear Priya,

Welcome to the Project Helios integration environment! We are thrilled to officially partner with you and the entire Meridian Group IT team on this initiative. 

As NovaBridge’s premier data integration platform, Project Helios is tailored to streamline data ingestion from your ERP system, apply your customized transformation rules, and securely deliver clean data to your reporting platforms via our APIs and webhooks. Knowing your specific focus on establishing reliable, live-data pipelines and ensuring a seamless transition into UAT, we are confident that Helios will equip your team with the robust visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To kick off our collaboration, we will securely share your access credentials and comprehensive onboarding documentation within the next 24 hours. 

In the meantime, here are a few immediate next steps to keep our integration timeline on track:
1. Please provide Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram to facilitate the integration environment setup (target date: July 12, 2026).
2. Your team is scheduled to provision UAT environment access by July 19, 2026.
3. We will collaborate to resolve any remaining setup items prior to our joint stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

Our team is fully committed to supporting you throughout this process. For any technical inquiries, please reach out to Derek Okafor, our Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination, scheduling, or general questions, please feel free to contact me directly. 

We truly look forward to a highly successful partnership with Meridian Group. Please do not hesitate to reach out if you have any questions or need further assistance.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text:
I have successfully reviewed and updated the draft for the welcome email to Meridian Group's IT lead. 

I found the draft in `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt` and improved the tone to make it more personalized and professional. The updated version specifically highlights their IT team, uses a warmer and more polished greeting/closing, frames the platform's features as direct solutions to their specific goals (like reliable live-data pipelines), and formats the action items and dates clearly.

The finalized version has been saved back to `client_onboarding_email_draft.txt` in the sandbox. Let me know if you need any further adjustments!
